_comment: Data-driven item + technique definitions. A designer adds items/techniques here without touching gameplay code.

items.name: Spirit Herb
items.desc: A faintly glowing herb steeped in wild qi. Used in Foundation Pills.

items.name: Foundation Pill
items.desc: A mortal-grade cultivation pill. Absorb it during meditation to hasten your foundation.

techniques.name: Scarlet Flame Palm
techniques.desc: Loose a bursting palm of fire — heat, embers, and a scorching light.

techniques.name: Gale-Rending Step
techniques.desc: A cutting gust that scatters leaves and dust.

techniques.name: Torrent Lash
techniques.desc: A whip of conjured water, misting the air.

techniques.name: Mountain-Root Fist
techniques.desc: A crushing strike carrying the weight of stone.

techniques.name: Verdant Vine Lash
techniques.desc: Living vines whip forth from your qi.

techniques.name: Golden Edge
techniques.desc: A razor arc of sword-qi — the fallback Dao of the blade.

techniques.name: Levin Arc
techniques.desc: A forking bolt of storm qi.

techniques.name: Corrosive Touch
techniques.desc: A creeping palm of poison qi.
